forge-edits: {"darkstar":{"tagline":"The night bends to his will.","origin":"Former Division I athlete and physics prodigy. Survived a government black-site dark energy experiment that killed every other subject. He didn't form the Knights out of heroism — he formed them because the organization was still operating and no one was stopping them.","stats":{"Power":100,"Speed":97,"Tech":60,"Intellect":90,"Will":99},"powers":[{"name":"Dark Ki Projection","desc":"Concentrated void-violet energy blasts that crack the air on release."},{"name":"Shadow Threading","desc":"Dark energy tendrils for grappling, binding, and high-speed traversal."},{"name":"Gravity Surge","desc":"Overrides gravity — flight, aerial combat, concussive ground launches."},{"name":"Final Surge","desc":"Full aura release multiplying strength and speed. Visible cost when it fades."}],"nkAlignment":"base","teamRank":"leader","gender":"Male","age":"750","birthYear":"1276","race":{"main":"alien","sub":"auranthi"},"species":"Auranthi"},"phantom-edge":{"tagline":"Every battle is already solved before it starts.","origin":"Top engineering graduate who discovered his employer was a front for the same organization that experimented on Kareem. He walked into their server room alone, copied everything, burned the rest, and rebuilt his tech from scratch.","stats":{"Power":88,"Speed":100,"Tech":100,"Intellect":100,"Will":92},"powers":[{"name":"Chrono Blade","desc":"Vibranium-alloy energy sword that phases through non-organic matter. Trails teal afterimages."},{"name":"Adaptive Nanosuit","desc":"Reconfigures in real-time — absorbs damage, shifts to offense, deploys micro-drones mid-combat."},{"name":"Elastic Form","desc":"Limbs stretch, coil, and rebound for unpredictable strikes and instant distance closing."},{"name":"Battlefield IQ","desc":"Visor HUD analyzes enemy patterns in seconds and feeds tactical data to the whole team."}],"nkAlignment":"base","gender":"Male","age":"47","race":"black","species":"Human"},"chimera":{"tagline":"He rewrote the rules of his own biology.","origin":"A geneticist whose research was stolen and weaponized without his knowledge. He administered his own prototype to himself. The process was supposed to be reversible. Most of it was.","stats":{"Power":96,"Speed":94,"Tech":98,"Intellect":100,"Will":95},"powers":[{"name":"Live Gene-Shift","desc":"Rewrites his own DNA on the fly — bone plating, razor claws, enhanced senses on demand."},{"name":"Catalyst Spheres","desc":"Self-guided orbs that detonate, emit EMP bursts, or form reactive barriers."},{"name":"Precision Strike","desc":"Baseball-honed reflexes plus enhanced genetics — lethal throwing accuracy at any range."},{"name":"Beast Intellect","desc":"Monstrous physical form doesn't dull the mind. Processes combat and science simultaneously."}],"nkAlignment":"base","teamRank":"vanguard","gender":"Male","age":"50","birthYear":"1976","race":{"main":"mutate","sub":"a_gene_mutate"},"species":"A-Gene Mutate"},"paladin":{"tagline":"He doesn't have the most power. He has the most heart.","origin":"Born from a secretive, ancient program of Enhanced Humans, Mario Richardson was part of a batch engineered to surpass human limits, granting him the foundation for his unyielding will and unique connection to his teammates. Decades of covert research and selective enhancements shaped him into Bastion Prime, the anchor of the Nocturnal Knights' unbreakable unity. His power now a testament to his unwavering commitment to his people.","stats":{"Power":92,"Speed":85,"Tech":50,"Intellect":88,"Will":100},"powers":[{"name":"Resolve Shield","desc":"Nearly unbreakable energy barrier fueled by pure willpower. Glows brighter as odds stack higher."},{"name":"Rally Aura","desc":"Pulse that restores focus and stamina to downed teammates. The team fights harder near him."},{"name":"Last Stand Surge","desc":"Strength and durability spike dramatically when the mission is truly on the brink."},{"name":"Unbreakable Will","desc":"Immune to mental attacks, fear, and manipulation. His calm steadies everyone around him."}],"nkAlignment":"base","teamRank":"operative","gender":"Male","age":"48","birthYear":"1978","race":{"main":"human","sub":"enhanced_human"},"species":"Enhanced Human"}}
forge-teams: [{"id":"team-1780012366109","name":"Nocturnal Knights","abbr":"NK","color":"#534AB7","colorLight":"#534AB7CC","type":"cosmic","nkAlignment":"base","isDefault":false,"description":"Dark urban anti-heroes operating in the shadows between crime and justice.","motto":"We are the dark between the lights.","origin":"Founded by Kareem Carter after surviving a government black-site experiment. The Knights exist because the organization responsible is still operating — and no legitimate hero was stopping them.","logoSeed":3,"createdAt":1780012366109},{"id":"team-1779426722159","name":"The Black Order","abbr":"TBO","color":"#A32D2D","colorLight":"#A32D2DCC","type":"global","nkAlignment":"allied","description":"A secretive coalition of international operatives, united to combat threats that transcend borders and governments.","motto":"Silence is strength","origin":"Founded by enigmatic strategist Rachel Kim in the aftermath of a global pandemic, The Black Order began as an elite cell responding to catastrophic events. As the world teetered on the brink of chaos, Kim forged an alliance with rogue agents and covert operatives from across the globe, pooling their unique skills to form a formidable counterweight against terrorism, corruption, and existential threats.","isDefault":false,"createdAt":1779426722159},{"id":"team-1779919573404","name":"Nocturnal Legacy","abbr":"NL","color":"#534AB7","colorLight":"#534AB7CC","type":"regional","nkAlignment":"allied","description":"Heirs to the shadows, defenders of their city's darkest corners.","motto":"Shadows are our legacy, vengeance is our duty.","origin":"Born from the losses and sacrifices of their parents, the children of Nocturnal Knights have grown up in the darkness. Tragedy and hardship forged them into a team, united by their desire for justice and haunted by the ghosts of their past.","logoSeed":3,"isDefault":false,"createdAt":1779919573404},{"id":"team-1779987238888","name":"Crimson Brigade","abbr":"CB","color":"#A32D2D","colorLight":"#A32D2DCC","type":"cosmic","nkAlignment":"allied","description":"A coalition of nocturnal vigilantes united against an impending cosmic threat.","motto":"Shadows unite, darkness prevails","origin":"Born from the ashes of personal tragedy and loss, the Crimson Brigade was forged when Mike Abacano's brother, a skilled astrologer, died on the eve of a catastrophic celestial event. Consumed by grief and anger, Mike turned to the stars for revenge, discovering an ancient artifact that amplified his own cosmic energies. Now, he leads the charge against the coming darkness alongside his fellow allies.","logoSeed":5,"isDefault":false,"createdAt":1779987238888}]
